case_title: STRINGER, BRENDA vs. CALNORTH ENGINEERING/PAT HARTY CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRINGER, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT CALNORTH ENGINEERING/PAT HARTY CONSTRUCTION THROWER, WILLIAM #0793 CC OF SF PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISION SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-22-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-23-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-02-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-22-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-22-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-21-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-21-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED OSC: AS TO WHY THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE AND COMPLIANCE WITH THE RULES OF COURT. HEARING SET FOR OCT-23-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRINGER, BRENDA HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR NOTICE AND HEARING OF MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRINGER, BRENDA
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF OCT-19-1995, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER.
ORDER WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR JORDAN, BRENT J AS ATTORNEY FOR STRINGER, BRENDA

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-23-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-23-1995, $ 100 SANCTIONS AGAINST THE PLTF WITH PAYMENT DUE ON OR BEFORE NOV 15, 1995. COURT MAY DISMISS IF NO GOOD CAUSE SHOWING AS TO FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 10/23/95 AND FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE. HEARING SET FOR NOV-22-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE ON SIGNED ORDER OF THE COURT ON MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AND DISCHARGED OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD DATED OCT 25, 1995; ON 30-OCT-95; BY MAIL; ON BRENDA STRINGER.

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-22-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-22-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: CASE WILL BE DISMISSED IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT APPEAR OR PRESENT GOOD CAUSE FOR NOT COMPLYING WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-04-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-04-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND ON CALENDAR AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH COURT RULES. COURT WILL DISMISS CASE IF NO APPEARANCE ON 3/11/96. HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
